Skilled Thief Bow's Soul

Once in a while, the soul owner steals 50% of crit, damage, and physical armor piercing from the enemy unit with the highest damage for 5 sec. They also deal physical damage equal to 300% of their attack to all enemy units.

Requirements: 98-100
